channel.name: L3 enable
channel.description: Puts the L3 engine back on

channel.name: LOAD LOOP JRM STATE OF NATION

channel.description: 236 - LOAD LOOP MATCH OF THE DAY

channel.name: 261- POS 4 BUFFER 3
channel.description: Load buffer 3 into screen behind CAM 4

channel.name: 262 - LED NEWS SET BUFFER 3 POS 4
channel.description: Newsreader GFX on video wall and BUFFER 3 loaded into CAM 4 position

channel.name: 923 - DISABLE NEWS MODE
channel.description: Disables all news assets and takes OB and wired mics out of standby

channel.name: 924 - ENABLE NEWS MODE
channel.description: Disables all news assets and takes OB and wired mics out of standby

channel.name: 307 - THE NEIL OLIVER SHOW BED
channel.description: The Neil Oliver Show Newsy Bed 2

channel.name: 955 - DISABLE NEWS MODE - DTL
channel.description: Disables all news assets and takes OB and wired mics out of standby

channel.name: 956 - ENABLE NEWS MODE - DTL
channel.description: Disables all news assets and takes OB and wired mics out of standby

channel.name: 117 - OPEN MAIN FADERS
channel.description: Opens the PRES, WIRED, and OB faders for use with the UPSOT template

setup.audio_file: THE LATE SHOW Live 4 min Bed Music

channel.name: 118 - RAISE MUSIC FOR UPSOT
channel.description: Opens the MUSIC fader for use with the UPSOT NO BED template

channel.name: TOGGLE FLOATS BOXES
channel.description: Triggers a macro on ME3 to go from floats fullframe to floats in boxes

channel.name: STOP MUSIC
channel.description: Stops music bed - included in sequence

channel.name: LOAD NEWS LED
channel.command_on_take_value_parameter: LOADS NEWS INTO CAM 6 LED AREA

takecommand.parameter: LOADS NEWS INTO CAM 6 LED AREA

setup.clip_hirespath: The GB News Peoples Poll Sting.mp4

channel.name: LOAD NEWS LED BUFFER 3 POS 4
channel.command_on_take_value_parameter: LOADS NEWS INTO CAM 6 LED AREA

takecommand.parameter: LOADS NEWS INTO CAM 6 LED AREA

channel.name: DISABLE NEWS MODE
channel.description: Disables Wired mics/Enables PRES and OB and removes EWS

channel.name: ENABLE NEWS MODE
channel.description: Enables Wired mics/Disables PRES and OB and adds EWS

channel.name: ST SCREEN TO GENERIC
channel.description: Sets screen in FSN to generic buffer

channel.name: ST SCREEN TO PROMPTER
channel.description: Sets screen in FSN to prompter

channel.name: ST SCREEN TO GENERIC
channel.description: Sets screen in FSN to generic

channel.name: PRES MICS OUT + MUSIC UP
channel.description: Lowers PRES mics to -90 and raises music to 0 over 3 seconds

channel.name: VECTAR MIX FIX
channel.description: Fixes the half mix on the Vectar

channel.name: WEATHER IN A
channel.description: WEATHER IN A PROMO WITH BUMPER

setup.clip_hirespath: 20251106 GBN BUMPER + BOXT IDENT_Boiler updated 6 NOV 2025.mp4

channel.name: TAG BREAK
channel.description: TAG BREAK WITH ST GEORGE FLAG

channel.name: Sub-Clip
channel.description: Template spesifically for sub clips made in MIMIR

channel.name: OPENER STATE OF THE NATION
channel.description: OPENER STATE OF NATION NO JACOB

channel.name: DISABLE NEWS TEMP
channel.description: Disables wired 3 and returns the rest of the studio to standby

channel.name: ENABLE NEWS TEMP
channel.description: Enables Wired mics/Disables PRES and OB and adds EWS

channel.name: MP CLEAR ALL BOOKSHELF SCREENS
channel.description: Clears the bookshelf of all individual graphics

channel.name: MP CLEAR BOOKSHELF FULL
channel.description: Clears the bookshelf of single graphics that fill all screens

channel.name: ENABLE STAGEBOX LEFT AND RIGHT
channel.description: Enables the left leg of the stagebox when connected

channel.name: STANDBY OFF GALLERY
channel.description: Takes the necessary items out of standby so the gallery can be used for on air

channel.name: STANDBY ON GALLERY
channel.description: Puts the necessary items into standby so the gallery can be used for off air

channel.name: DISABLE STAGEBOX LEFT AND RIGHT
channel.description: Closes the left and right leg of the stagebox when connected

channel.name: FLOWICS GFX TOGGLE
channel.description: Turns ON/OFF DSK3 with the FLOWICS graphic loaded into BUFFER 7
channel.command_on_take_value_parameter: FLOWICS graphics loaded into buffer 7 and enabled on DSK3

takecommand.parameter: FLOWICS graphics loaded into buffer 7 and enabled on DSK3

channel.name: STING FARAGE OB
channel.description: STING FARAGE with OB master fader open

channel.name: ENABLE SOLO MIC L
channel.description: Enables the AUDIENCE LEFT MIC as a mic on no stem for singers to use in the studio
